voting.title: Voting Notifications
voting.description: Control when you hear about voting events
voting.newEventsDescription: When a new vote is created in your assembly
voting.deadlinesDescription: 24-hour warning before voting or surveys close
surveys.title: Survey Notifications
surveys.description: Surveys are how your community collects observations from the ground
surveys.newSurveysDescription: When a new survey is created in your assembly
admin.title: Admin Notifications
admin.description: Email alerts for group administration events. These only apply to groups where you are an admin or owner.
admin.joinRequestsDescription: When someone requests to join a group you administer
admin.newMembersDescription: When someone joins a group you administer
channel.title: Delivery Channel
channel.description: How you want to receive email notifications
channel.label: Channel
channel.labelDescription: Controls email delivery only — in-app notifications always appear in the notification bell
channel.disabledWarning: Email notifications are disabled. You'll still see all notifications in the notification bell and on the notifications page.
language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language for the Votiverse interface. The page will reload to apply your selection.
connectedAccounts.title: Connected accounts
connectedAccounts.description: Link your Google or Microsoft account for easy sign-in.
connectedAccounts.none: No social login providers are configured.
appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how Votiverse looks. Select a theme or let it follow your system settings.
